name: openada
description: Open agent-EDA contracts, deterministic drivers, and tool-independent engineering skills.

interface.shortDescription: Open EDA contracts and engineering skills
interface.longDescription: Help Codex invoke open-source EDA through bounded, versioned results and apply reusable backend-independent engineering workflows.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this EDA workspace and report available tools and PDKs.
Review this circuit simulation and recommend the next engineering step.
Run the applicable DRC or LVS check and summarize the evidence.
